overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character exploring a futuristic commercial interior with blue neon lighting. The character walks through a seafood market area and connecting corridors in a clean, sci-fi setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic reception lounge with display tables

events.description: character stands up from examining the display table and begins walking
character stops at the side desk to look at the monitor

agents.ego_description: walking from the central display table toward a side counter with a computer terminal, examining the surroundings

entered.detail: low white table with a spherical artifact on top
long white counter with a shopkeeper behind it
modern white couch against the blue wall
small white desk with a monitor and vertical light strips beside it
colorful abstract artwork with pink and blue strokes

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a futuristic lounge area with blue walls and white furniture. They walk from a central display table holding a spherical object toward a side desk with a computer terminal, passing a white sofa. The area is empty except for a distant shopkeeper at the main counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: seafood market stall with neon signage

events.description: turns away from the side desk and walks back into the main retail area
approaches the XENOFRESH seafood counter and walks past it toward the exit

agents.ego_description: walking through the main retail area, approaching and passing the XENOFRESH seafood counter

notable_agents.action: shopkeeper standing behind the seafood counter wearing an orange apron

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with 'XENOFRESH seafood' text on blue wall
long white service desk with display cases
green and black poster with 'AURORA' text and geometric face design
doorway leading to a connecting corridor

segments.scene_description: The character turns back into the main retail area, revealing the XENOFRESH seafood counter with its bright neon signage. They walk past the service counter where a shopkeeper stands, heading toward an exit doorway. The area features product displays and corporate posters on the blue walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: connecting corridor with geometric wall art

events.description: exits the open shop area and enters a narrow connecting corridor
passes by two pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor past other pedestrians, approaching a large landscape artwork at the end

notable_agents.action: man in gray jacket walking toward the camera
second person walking behind the first pedestrian

entered.detail: blue and gold geometric diamond pattern covering the right wall
large framed photograph of a mountain landscape with clouds
low white cabinet beneath the landscape artwork

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow corridor with distinctive blue and gold geometric wall sculptures. They pass two pedestrians walking in the opposite direction while approaching a large landscape photograph at the corridor's end. The space is more confined than the previous open retail area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile futuristic commercial hub that transitions from a quiet lounge into a bustling retail space and finally into a narrow decorative corridor. It begins in a lounge area with blue walls and white furniture, moving from a central display table past a sofa toward a computer terminal. As the character turns back toward the main retail area, the space opens up to reveal the bright neon signage of the XENOFRESH seafood counter and a shopkeeper standing behind the service desk. The scene then shifts from the open market, passing corporate posters and product displays, as the camera moves through an exit doorway. Finally, the environment becomes more confined as the camera enters a narrow corridor lined with blue and gold geometric sculptures, passing pedestrians while approaching a large landscape photograph at the far end.
